examples: The results show that the asymmetric distribution of orography and that of horizontal diffusion coefficients are likely to be the causes leading to the asymmetric motion.
The results from a sensitivity experiment with decreased orography height show that the upward and southward transport of dust aerosols is depressed when orography height is decreased.
Orography is properly introduced in the operational numerical model of Shanghai Institute of Typhoon and some real synoptic weather processes are used to test the dynamic effects of orography.
